title: catabrosa minor
intro: Catabrosa minor, also known as green orchid grass, is a perennial plant species in the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Catabrosa minor include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Catabrosa minor can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice for those seeking natural remedies.
